title: I'm Not Tired
lyrics:
[opening]
Mama, mama, mama, mama!
What?
Mama, mama, mama, mama!
What now?
Mama, mama, mama, mama!
WHAT?!
I'm not tired!

[verse]
My toes are dancing, still wired!
I don't wanna go, I'm fired!
Look at me jump so much higher!
I'm not sleepy, you're the liar!

[chorus]
I'm not tired! No, no, no!
I'm not tired! Watch me go!
I'm not tired! Here I am!
I'm not tired! *bam bam bam*

[verse]
I need more water from my cup! *what?*
My blanket's wrong side up!
The cat still needs a hug! *really?*
I found a cool new bug!

[chorus]
I'm not tired! No, no, no!
I'm not tired! Watch me go!
I'm not tired! Here I am!
I'm not tired! *bam bam bam*

[verse]
The moon is too bright in the sky! *yawn*
I need to tell you why!
My socks don't match, oh my!
I'm just... so... *burp* ...not... shy!

[chorus]
I'm not tired... no, no...
I'm not tired... *yawn*... so...
I'm not... *snore*... tired...
...zzz... *crash* ...goodnight.
style_prompt: Super catchy bouncy children's song, bright ukulele, hand claps, strong bouncy bass pop, 120 BPM, toddler bounce energy, call and response, cheeky fun playground chant, simple infectious groove
cover_description: A tiny toddler in pajamas standing defiantly with arms crossed, eyes WIDE OPEN while a huge yawn escapes, a teddy bear asleep beside them, nighttime bedroom with stars outside the window
rhyme_family: wired, fired, hired, mired, inspired, acquired, required, expired, retired, admired, choir-ed, higher, liar, flyer, buyer, drier, crier, sired, spired, pyre-ed
